历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 19403 → 18092 → 18705 → 19160 → 22045, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend. In 2025, it shifted back by about 2885 places compared to 2024, with a baseline ranking of approximately 22045. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Guangdong was 56 in 2021, 53 in 2022, 52 in 2023, 58 in 2024, and 59 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 50, a reduction of about 15.3% compared to 2025, indicating a significant reduction in enrollment, which eases competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985, 211, and Double First-Class university. Shandong University (Weihai) is the Weihai campus of Shandong University. The main campus ranks 22nd on the Soft Science Main Ranking (2026), indicating a top-tier level. In recent years, Shandong University's reputation has been somewhat negative, with incidents such as the 'study partner' event continuously affecting public perception. It ranks 20th on Douyin (high heat), with high exposure but predominantly negative reviews, which somewhat suppresses application enthusiasm. Shandong University has A+ in Mathematics, A in Chinese Language and Literature, A in Foreign Languages and Literature, A in Control Science and Engineering, and A in Marxist Theory. The Weihai campus offers majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information, and Mathematics, which are closely related to the main campus's advantageous disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Location
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering are highly recommended and socially popular, with strong application willingness. In 2026, the number of Physics Category examinees in Guangdong is approximately 456,000, an increase of about 3.6% compared to 2025, indicating a continuous expansion of the candidate pool and rising competition. Shandong University (Weihai) is located in Weihai City, Shandong Province, which is an inter-provincial application for Guangdong candidates, with a neutral to slightly weak regional preference factor.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 22045, the significant enrollment reduction in 2026 (-15.3%) causing a forward shift in ranking, the increase in total examinees (+3.6%) intensifying competition, and the negative reputation suppressing enthusiasm, combined with the expansion of the candidate pool and the warming of major popularity, a small positive correction is made. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 20227, with a range of 19727–20727.

If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 19500), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors.
